body_preview: - Self-test on Day 110: `yyds state graph clusters` shows the usage line requires `<event-id|patch-id|eval-id|commit>` but does not tell the user how to discover valid IDs. The assessment recorded: "UX friction: help doesn't explain what arguments to pass." - The current error path (line 466 of src/commands_state_graph.rs) prints a wall of usage text without
expected_evidence: Assessment self-tests will show `state graph clusters` gives helpful guidance Future users won't get stuck on the "what ID do I use" question No new test failures or command regressions Implementation Notes: The dispatch for `graph clusters` is at line 69 of `src/commands_state_graph.rs`: ```rust if args.get(3).map(|arg| arg.as_str()) == Some("clusters") { `
title: Improve `state graph clusters` discoverability with ID discovery hints
